convention: The assistant invokes a tool by replying with EXACTLY one fenced json block containing {"tool": <name>, "args": {...}} and nothing else. The serving layer enforces this shape with constrained decoding; these definitions are the single source of truth for both training traces and the runtime harness.

tools.name: get_plan
tools.description: Read a week's plan JSON. Use before answering any question about what is planned.

tools.name: add_to_plan
tools.description: Add a recipe to a slot. Never overwrites; entries stack.

tools.name: remove_from_plan
tools.description: Remove one plan entry by its id.

tools.name: toggle_slot_out
tools.description: Mark a slot as eating out (free lunch, restaurant dinner) or undo it. The app computes the macro credit itself.

tools.name: get_recipe
tools.description: Read one recipe's full JSON by id.

tools.name: save_recipe_edit
tools.description: Persist an edited recipe JSON for the active profile (profile-scoped override; the shared bank is never mutated). The full recipe object must be provided; the app validates schema and rejects missing fields.

tools.name: get_pantry
tools.description: Read the pantry (staples + perishables with added dates).

tools.name: get_shopping_list
tools.description: Read the current derived shopping list.

tools.name: greger_audit
tools.description: Ask the Greger nutrition sub-agent to audit a recipe or answer an is-this-healthy question. ALWAYS defer nutrition verdicts to this tool instead of answering from memory.

tools.name: parse_receipt
tools.description: Send a receipt photo to the vision model; returns store + priced line items.

tools.name: scan_shelf
tools.description: Send a fridge/pantry photo to the vision model; returns recognized items for user approval.
